text.div:
Generated Narrative: ImplementationGuide et.fhir.core

Language: en

ETBase

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

http://fhir.et/core/ImplementationGuide/et.fhir.core

Implementation Guide to be used as abase for Implementation Guides in Ethiopia

name: ETBase
title: Ethiopia Base Implementation Guide
description: Implementation Guide to be used as abase for Implementation Guides in Ethiopia

extension.valueMarkdown: This IG uses SMART base computable guideline capabilities

resource.name: Accepted social network-based/partner services
resource.description: Indicates whether the client accepted partner or social network-based services

resource.name: Address Kebele
resource.description: Administrative sub-district (Kebele) within a Woreda.

resource.name: Address Ketena/Gott
resource.description: Administrative subdivision within a Kebele, also called Ketena or Gott.

resource.name: Address Zone
resource.description: Administrative zone within a state or region.

resource.name: Adolescent Girl Indicator
resource.description: Indicates whether the client is an adolescent girl

resource.name: ART Adherence Value Set
resource.description: Value set for documenting ART adherence

resource.name: ART Start Date
resource.description: Date when antiretroviral therapy was initiated

resource.name: cachment Area
resource.description: Catchment area of the HIV patient (such as villages, districts, etc)

resource.name: Chlamydia trachomatis Test Type Code System
resource.description: Codes for Chlamydia trachomatis test types

resource.name: Chlamydia trachomatis Test Type Observation
resource.description: Type of Chlamydia trachomatis test performed

resource.name: Chlamydia trachomatis Test Type Value Set
resource.description: Allowed values for Chlamydia trachomatis test types

resource.name: Clinical Enquiry for Intimate Partner Violence (IPV)
resource.description: Indicates whether clinical enquiry for intimate partner violence (IPV) was conducted

resource.name: community Entry Point ValueSet
resource.description: ValueSet for community entry points

resource.name: Confirmatory STI Test Result Observation
resource.description: Captures confirmatory STI result and treatment details

resource.name: Confirmatory Syphilis Test Observation
resource.description: Captures syphilis confirmatory test type and related details

resource.name: Confirmatory Syphilis Test Type CodeSystem
resource.description: Codes for confirmatory syphilis test types

resource.name: Confirmatory Syphilis Test Type ValueSet
resource.description: Value set for confirmatory syphilis test types

resource.name: Consent to be Contacted
resource.description: Indicates whether the patient consents to be contacted for follow-up or program communication

resource.name: Consent to Receive Family Planning Follow-up Messages
resource.description: Indicates whether the client consents to receive SMS or other messages for family planning follow-up

resource.name: Counselling Provided
resource.description: Indicates types of counselling provided to the client

resource.name: Counselling Provided CodeSystem
resource.description: Types of counselling provided to client

resource.name: Count of contacts or partners given for social network/partner services
resource.description: Number of contacts or partners elicited for partner notification or social network-based services

resource.name: Date HIV Test Sent
resource.description: Date when the HIV test specimen was sent to the laboratory

resource.name: Date of Birth Estimated
resource.description: Indicates whether the date of birth is estimated rather than exact.

resource.name: Date of First HIV Positive Test
resource.description: Date of first positive test indicative of HIV diagnosis

resource.name: Educational Status
resource.description: Extension to record the educational status of the patient

resource.name: Ethiopia Education Status CodeSystem
resource.description: CodeSystem representing the educational status categories used in Ethiopia

resource.name: Ethiopia Education Status ValueSet
resource.description: ValueSet containing all education status codes used in Ethiopia

resource.name: Ethiopia Observation Code CodeSystem
resource.description: Interim local Observation.code concepts for Ethiopia-specific observations that currently lack a correct or tx-resolvable LOINC code. These SHOULD be mapped to proper LOINC codes when available (see REMEDIATION-REPORT.md).

resource.name: Ethiopia Occupation CodeSystem
resource.description: CodeSystem representing the occupation categories used in Ethiopia

resource.name: Ethiopia Occupation ValueSet
resource.description: ValueSet containing all occupation codes used in Ethiopia

resource.name: Ethiopia State / Region CodeSystem
resource.description: Administrative states and city administrations of Ethiopia

resource.name: Ethiopia State / Region ValueSet
resource.description: Allowed list of Ethiopian states and city administrations.

resource.name: Ethiopian Master Facility Registry Location
resource.description: Physical service delivery locations registered in the Ethiopian MFR.

resource.name: Ethiopian Patient Gender values
resource.description: Patient Gender....

resource.name: Ethiopian Patient Marital Status values
resource.description: Patient Marital Status....

resource.name: Ethiopian patient profile
resource.description: This profile represents a standard Ethiopian patient, applicable across all use cases and health information systems.

resource.name: Example Ethiopian Patient
resource.description: Example instance conforming to the Ethiopian Patient profile

resource.name: Expected Date of Delivery (EDD)
resource.description: Estimated date when the patient is expected to deliver

resource.name: Facility Created Date
resource.description: Date the facility was registered or created in the Ethiopian Master Facility Registry.

resource.name: Facility Entry Point ValueSet
resource.description: ValueSet for facility entry points

resource.name: Gestational Age
resource.description: Gestational age in weeks (and optionally days)

resource.name: Gonorrhoea Testing and Treatment
resource.description: Captures gonorrhoea test date, specimen type, test result, treatment start date, and other specimen specification

resource.name: Grandfather's Family Name
resource.description: The family name of the person's grandfather.

resource.name: Herpes Simplex Virus (HSV) Test Type Observation
resource.description: Type of Herpes simplex virus (HSV) test performed

resource.name: Herpes Simplex Virus Test Type Code System
resource.description: Codes for Herpes simplex virus (HSV) test types

resource.name: Herpes Simplex Virus Test Type Value Set
resource.description: Allowed values for Herpes simplex virus (HSV) test types

resource.name: History of HIV Self-Testing
resource.description: Indicates whether the client reported having used an HIV self-test before

resource.name: HIV ART Adherence Code System
resource.description: Codes representing the client's adherence to ART treatment

resource.name: HIV Assay Number
resource.description: Assay number used in HIV testing strategy

resource.name: HIV Assay Number CodeSystem
resource.description: Assay sequence in HIV testing strategy

resource.name: HIV Assay Number ValueSet
resource.description: Permitted assay numbers in HIV testing strategy

resource.name: HIV Assay Result CodeSystem
resource.description: Result of HIV assay

resource.name: HIV Assay Result ValueSet
resource.description: Allowed HIV assay results

resource.name: HIV Client Informed of Result
resource.description: Indicates whether the client has been informed of their HIV test result.

resource.name: HIV Condition Code System
resource.description: Clinical HIV-related conditions and diagnoses

resource.name: HIV Condition Value Set
resource.description: Value set representing HIV-related conditions and statuses

resource.name: HIV Diagnosis Date
resource.description: Date when HIV diagnosis was established

resource.name: HIV Diagnosis Facility
resource.description: Facility where the client received an HIV-positive diagnosis

resource.name: HIV Exposure Ways CodeSystem
resource.description: Codes representing possible HIV exposure routes

resource.name: HIV Exposure Ways Observation
resource.description: Records ways in which the client was exposed to HIV

resource.name: HIV Partner / Contact Person
resource.description: Represents a partner or contact identified during HIV testing services

resource.name: HIV Prevention Services and Referrals CodeSystem
resource.description: Prevention services offered and referrals provided

resource.name: HIV Prevention Services and Referrals ValueSet
HIV Program Patient
resource.description: Patient profile for individuals enrolled in the national HIV program

resource.name: HIV Retest and Risk Assessment
resource.description: Captures whether HIV retesting prior to ART initiation was conducted and whether the client is at elevated risk for HIV acquisition

resource.name: HIV Serotype
resource.description: Type of HIV infection (HIV-1 or HIV-2)

resource.name: HIV Serotype Codes
resource.description: Codes for HIV-1 and HIV-2

resource.name: HIV Serotype ValueSet
resource.description: HIV serotype classification

resource.name: HIV Test Conducted (Boolean)
resource.description: Indicates whether an HIV test was conducted

resource.name: HIV Test Ordered (Boolean)
resource.description: Indicates whether an HIV test was ordered

resource.name: HIV Test Type
resource.description: Type of HIV test performed

resource.name: HIV Test Type Codes
resource.description: Types of HIV tests

resource.name: HIV Test Type ValueSet
resource.description: Permitted HIV test types

resource.name: HIV Testing Entry Point CodeSystem
resource.description: Defines entry points for HIV Testing Services

resource.name: HIV Testing Entry Point ValueSet
resource.description: ValueSet of HIV Testing Service entry points

resource.name: HIV Testing for community entry point CodeSystem
resource.description: Defines entry points for community entry point

resource.name: HIV Testing for facility entry point CodeSystem
resource.description: Defines entry points for facility entry point

resource.name: HIV Testing Reason ValueSet
resource.description: Reasons for HIV testing

resource.name: HTS Service CodeSystem
resource.description: Codes for HIV Testing Services (HTS) service types.

resource.name: HTS Service Types ValueSet
resource.description: Value set for HTS service delivery types.

resource.name: Infant Breastfeeding Status
resource.description: Indicates whether the infant is currently being breastfed by the mother

resource.name: IPV Enquiry Result
resource.description: Outcome of intimate partner violence enquiry

resource.name: IPV Enquiry Result CodeSystem
resource.description: Results of intimate partner violence enquiry

resource.name: Key Population Member Type
resource.description: Specifies the type of key population the client belongs to

resource.name: Key Population Membership
resource.description: Indicates whether the client is a member of a key population with increased risk of HIV

resource.name: Mycoplasma genitalium Test Type Code System
resource.description: Codes for Mycoplasma genitalium test types

resource.name: Mycoplasma genitalium Test Type Observation
resource.description: Type of Mycoplasma genitalium test performed

resource.name: Mycoplasma genitalium Test Type Value Set
resource.description: Allowed values for Mycoplasma genitalium test types

resource.name: Neisseria gonorrhoeae Test Type Code System
resource.description: Codes for Neisseria gonorrhoeae test types

resource.name: Neisseria gonorrhoeae Test Type Observation
resource.description: Type of Neisseria gonorrhoeae test performed

resource.name: Neisseria gonorrhoeae Test Type Value Set
resource.description: Allowed values for Neisseria gonorrhoeae test types

resource.name: Observation Component Specify CodeSystem
resource.description: Codes identifying free-text 'specify' Observation.component slices (e.g. other / point-of-care test type), used as the slice discriminator value.

resource.name: Occupation Extension
resource.description: Extension to record the occupation of the patient

resource.name: Offered social network-based/partner services
resource.description: Indicates whether partner or social network-based services were offered

resource.name: Offered Voluntary Partner Services
resource.description: Indicates whether voluntary partner services were offered

resource.name: Other Clinical Services Offered
resource.description: Indicates other clinical services offered to the client

resource.name: Other Clinical Services Offered CodeSystem
resource.description: Other clinical services offered to the client

resource.name: Other Support Services
resource.description: Indicates other support services provided to the client

resource.name: Other Support Services CodeSystem
resource.description: Support services provided to the client

resource.name: Partner Contact Type Codes
resource.description: Types of contacts or partners for partner services

resource.name: Partner High Risk Population Category
resource.description: Indicates whether the client's partner belongs to a high-risk population

resource.name: Partner HIV Status
resource.description: HIV status of the client's partner

resource.name: Partner Notification and Disclosure Status
resource.description: Captures HIV status disclosure and notification planning for partner services

resource.name: Partner Services Referral Codes
resource.description: Codes for referral through partner services

resource.name: Prefered contact CodeSystem
resource.description: CodeSystem representing the Prefered Contact

resource.name: Preferred Contact Method
resource.description: Patient’s preferred communication channel.

resource.name: Pregnancy Status (Boolean)
resource.description: Indicates whether the client is currently pregnant

resource.name: PrEP Encounter
resource.description: Encounter profile for PrEP/PEP services.

resource.name: PrEP Visit Interval CodeSystem
resource.description: Represents scheduled PrEP visit intervals.

resource.name: PrEP Visit Observation
resource.description: Indicates attendance of a scheduled PrEP visit by interval.

resource.name: PrEP Visit Reason CodeSystem
resource.description: Codes representing reasons for PrEP/PEP visits.

resource.name: Prevention Services Offered and Referrals
resource.description: Indicates HIV prevention services offered and referrals provided to the client

resource.name: Referred through partner services
resource.description: Indicates whether the client was referred through partner services and the type of referral

resource.name: Reporting Hierarchy ID
resource.description: Identifier for reporting hierarchy

resource.name: Sexual and Reproductive Health Integrated Services
resource.description: Indicates SRH integrated services provided to the client

resource.name: Sexual and Reproductive Health Integrated Services CodeSystem
resource.description: Types of SRH integrated services provided

resource.name: Sexual and Reproductive Health Integrated Services ValueSet
STI Test Result CodeSystem
resource.description: Codes for STI test results

resource.name: STI Test Result Observation
resource.description: Observation for STI test result with confirmatory test date

resource.name: STI Test Result ValueSet
resource.description: Value set for STI test results

resource.name: STI Testing and Diagnosis
resource.description: Captures whether any STI syndrome was diagnosed, date of STI test, and STI(s) tested for

resource.name: Suspected HIV Exposure (Boolean)
resource.description: Indicates whether the client is reported to have had suspected exposure to HIV

resource.name: Suspected HIV Exposure Observation
resource.description: Indicates contact with and suspected exposure to HIV.

resource.name: Syndrome/STI Diagnosed
resource.description: Captures the syndrome or STI diagnosed, including option to specify other conditions

resource.name: Syphilis Test Type Code System
resource.description: Codes for syphilis test types

resource.name: Syphilis Test Type Observation
resource.description: Type of syphilis test performed

resource.name: Syphilis Test Type Value Set
resource.description: Allowed syphilis test type values

resource.name: Syphilis Testing and Treatment
resource.description: Captures syphilis test date, test result, and treatment initiation date

resource.name: Trichomonas vaginalis Test Type Code System
resource.description: Codes for Trichomonas vaginalis test types

resource.name: Trichomonas vaginalis Test Type Observation
resource.description: Type of Trichomonas vaginalis test performed

resource.name: Trichomonas vaginalis Test Type Value Set
resource.description: Allowed values for Trichomonas vaginalis test types

resource.name: Type of Follow-Up
resource.description: Captures follow-up type, recommended date, scheduled appointment date/time, and additional details

resource.name: VMMC Adverse Events
resource.description: Captures adverse events following VMMC, including severity, timing, seriousness, and date

resource.name: VMMC Procedure
resource.description: Indicates whether Voluntary Medical Male Circumcision (VMMC) procedure was performed

resource.name: VMMC Procedure Date
resource.description: Captures the date/time when the VMMC procedure was performed

resource.name: Ways of HIV Exposure
resource.description: Ways in which the client was exposed to HIV

resource.name: Young Woman Indicator
resource.description: Indicates whether the client is a young woman
